yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_FortiGate_CVE202559718_Exploitation_Inci {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Findings"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59718" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FortiGate" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Attackers_exploit_critical_Flowise_flaw_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for remote code execution"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59528" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Attackers_exploit_critical_Flowise_flaw_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for remote code execution"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59528" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Fortinet_Issues_Emergency_Patch_for_Fort {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "FortiClient" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Phishing_LNK_files_and_GitHub_C2_power_n {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Phishing LNK files and GitHub C2 power new DPRK cyber attacks"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "GitHub" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Experts_published_unpatched_Windows_zero {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Experts published unpatched Windows zero-day BlueHammer"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-09"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "BlueHammer" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Fin"; content:"CVE-2025-59718"; nocase; sid:2918531; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for r"; content:"CVE-2025-59528"; nocase; sid:4270991; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Attackers exploit critical Flowise flaw CVE-2025-59528 for r"; content:"CVE-2025-59528"; nocase; sid:4270991; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
